pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.3 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Configure the project to compile and run on Java 21.
Rename the project artifact and name from 'example' to 'happycows' to reflect the specific application.
Update the project description to accurately describe the application as a simulation game.
pom.xml.human_impl: <description>A Simulation Game of the Tragedy of the Commons.</description>

pom.xml.general_idea: Add a Maven property to define target classes for tooling or testing.
Remove the MongoDB starter dependency, likely switching to a different data store or removing persistence.
Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to a version compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for API documentation.
Add Microsoft Playwright for end-to-end browser testing.
Add WireMock for stubbing HTTP services during testing.
Add Awaitility for testing asynchronous code.
Explicitly add Spring Security Config dependency to manage security context in async threads.
Add Apache Commons CSV for handling CSV data processing.
Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use full annotation processing.
Configure Surefire plugin to use TCP for event transmission to fix test execution issues.
Add Git Commit ID plugin to generate git properties during the build.
Upgrade JaCoCo plugin to a newer version compatible with the new build environment.
Update JaCoCo exclusion patterns to match the new package structure (happiercows).

.gitignore.general_idea: Add an alternative directory name for Storybook static output to the ignore list to prevent accidental commits.
Ignore macOS .DS_Store files to keep the repository clean of OS-specific metadata.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace Debian-based apt-get package installation with Alpine-based apk add commands due to the switch to an Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven explicitly via apk since the new base image does not include it, ensuring the build tool is available.
Install Node.js using nvm to ensure a specific, modern version (16.20.0) is available for frontend builds, replacing the old NodeSource setup.
Install libstdc++ to provide C++ standard library support required by native dependencies or tools in the Alpine environment.
Install git to support build steps or configuration that rely on git metadata or commands.
Add explicit Maven build step to compile and package the application during image creation, replacing the previous run-any-command approach.
Define a specific entrypoint to run the generated JAR file, ensuring the container starts the Java application correctly.
Set the PRODUCTION environment variable to true to configure the application for production mode.
Copy the entire project directory including git info to support Dokku deployment requirements.

README.md.general_idea: Rename the project title and description to reflect the new 'HappyCows' application identity.
README.md.human_impl: Changed header from '# demo-spring-react-example-v2' to '# HappyCows/HappierCows' and updated description text.

README.md.general_idea: Replace old Storybook and Heroku deployment links with new Dokku deployment tables for production and QA environments.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced Storybook links with tables listing 'happycows.dokku-00.cs.ucsb.edu' and team-specific QA links.

README.md.general_idea: Remove documentation sections specific to Heroku deployment and database access, as the platform has migrated to Dokku.
README.md.human_impl: Deleted 'Getting Started on Heroku' and 'Accessing Database Console' sections containing Heroku CLI commands.

README.md.general_idea: Update error messages and instructions to reference Dokku instead of Heroku.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'On Heroku, be sure that PRODUCTION is defined' to 'On Dokku, be sure that PRODUCTION is defined'.

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for running integration, end-to-end, and mutation tests.
README.md.human_impl: Added sections 'To Run Integration and End-to-end Tests' and 'Partial pitest runs' with Maven commands.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for React Toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook previews.
Add import for MSW Storybook addon to enable API mocking in Storybook.
Initialize Mock Service Worker with dynamic URL resolution for localhost and remote environments.
Add MSW decorator globally to all stories to enable mocking capabilities.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: mswDecorator, // provide the MSW decorator globally

frontend/docs-index/_config.yml.general_idea: Simplify the Jekyll site title from a QA-specific label to a generic documentation title.
frontend/docs-index/_config.yml.human_impl: title: QA Site for Documentation -> title: Documentation

frontend/docs-index/_config.yml.general_idea: Remove a duplicate definition of repo_name that appeared in the middle of the configuration file.
Update the placeholder value for repo_name to a more neutral TBD string.

frontend/docs-index/_layouts/default.htm.general_idea: Change the HTML title tag to display the repository name instead of the page-specific title.
Remove the external stylesheet link from the document head.
Refactor the main heading to use a more descriptive label for the documentation section.

frontend/docs-index/index.md.general_idea: Replace simple list-based documentation index with structured tables for better readability and organization.
frontend/docs-index/index.md.human_impl: Replaced bullet points with HTML tables for Documentation, Test Coverage, and Open Pull Requests sections.

frontend/docs-index/index.md.general_idea: Add inline CSS to style the new table-based documentation index.
frontend/docs-index/index.md.human_impl: Added <style> block with border, padding, and zebra-stripe rules for tables.

frontend/docs-index/index.md.general_idea: Update repository links to point to GitHub Actions instead of a separate docs repo.
Add dynamic tables to display Javadoc, Storybook, and test coverage reports for open pull requests.
frontend/docs-index/index.md.human_impl: Added Jinja2 loops {% for pr in site.pull_requests %} to generate rows for PR-specific reports.

frontend/docs-index/index.md.general_idea: Add a notes section explaining potential issues with PR report links and incremental pitest results.
frontend/docs-index/index.md.human_impl: Added '## Notes' section with bullet points explaining link validity and pitest behavior.

Add nock for HTTP request mocking in tests.
Add react-hook-form for form state management.
Add react-toastify for toast notification components.
Upgrade Stryker mutator to version 6 to align with newer testing standards.
Upgrade Stryker Jest runner to version 6 to match core version.
Add ESLint for code linting and quality enforcement.
Add eslint-plugin-react for React-specific linting rules.
Add jest-watch-typeahead to improve Jest watch mode experience.
Add MSW (Mock Service Worker) for API mocking in tests.
Add msw-storybook-addon to integrate MSW with Storybook.
Pin Node.js version to 16.20.0 to ensure consistent runtime environment.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Explicitly pin the required Node.js version to 16.20.0 to ensure environment consistency.
Add @testing-library/dom as a direct dependency for testing utilities.
Add babel-loader to dependencies, likely for explicit build configuration control.
Add nock for HTTP request mocking in tests.
Add react-hook-form library for form state management.
Add react-toastify for toast notification components.
